title: Orientation
subtitle: To introduce newly admitted students to BVP Optica, its vision, activities, and opportunities related to optics, photonics, research, and technical development.
description: BVP Optica organized an Orientation Session for freshers to familiarize them with the society’s work culture and initiatives. The session provided an overview of the society’s focus on research, innovation, and skill development, helping students understand the role and purpose of the society within the college.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Presentation showcasing previous events, workshops, and industrial visits
Introduction to research opportunities and faculty mentorship
Interactive discussion with students about participation and involvement
Introduction to BVP Optica’s research-focused culture
Showcase of past events and achievements
Information about industrial visits and technical exposure
